feed.title: Toyota Global
feed.subtitle: Toyota news from the USA, Europe, the global newsroom, Toyota Connected, and Toyota Research Institute, in one feed.

entry.title: Toyota Announces Executive Changes
entry.content: PLANO, Texas (June 19, 2026) – Toyota announced executive changes to its manufacturing, supply chain, and financial services operations designed to better serve its customers, drive continued growth, and advance its commitment to building where it sells. The post Toyota Announces Executive Changes appeared first on Toyota USA Newsroom .

entry.title: Working With Dad: Toyota Team Members Share Their Stories
entry.content: This Father’s Day, we celebrate the dads and grown children whose Toyota journey has brought them closer together. Beyond family ties, they’ve shared milestones, memories and meaningful moments that have strengthened their bond both at home and at work. Joshua […] The post Working With Dad: Toyota Team Members Share Their Stories appeared first on Toyota USA Newsroom .

entry.title: 2026 Acropolis Rally Greece - TGR-WRT titans take title fight to Greek gravel
entry.content: At the halfway stage of the season, following a 1-2-3-4 finish on home roads at Rally Japan three weeks ago, TGR-WRT leads the manufacturers’ standings by 127 points while its five drivers occupy the top five places in the drivers’ standings. After winning in Japan, Elfyn Evans has a lead of 20 points ahead of Takamoto Katsuta. The team’s youngest drivers, Oliver Solberg and Sami Pajari, are third and fourth, 49 and 55 points respectively from the lead. Reigning champion Sébastien Ogier, a pr...

entry.title: Acropolis Rally Greece: Preview TGR-WRT titans take title fight to Greek gravel
entry.content: TOYOTA GAZOO Racing World Rally Team begins a sequence of seven successive gravel challenges that will decide the 2026 FIA World Rally Championship when the legendary Acropolis Rally in Greece stages round eight of the season.

entry.title: Toyota Recalls Certain Model Year 2026 Toyota bZ and Lexus RZ vehicles
entry.content: PLANO, Texas (June 18, 2026) — Toyota is conducting a safety recall involving certain model year 2026 bZ and Lexus RZ vehicles in North America. Approximately 16,200 vehicles are involved in this recall. The ECU for the battery supplying electricity to […] The post Toyota Recalls Certain Model Year 2026 Toyota bZ and Lexus RZ vehicles appeared first on Toyota USA Newsroom .

entry.title: Inside Toyota R&D: Meet the Engineers Driving Innovation and Mobility
entry.content: At Toyota, mobility means more than just getting from point A to point B. It’s about creating seamless, enjoyable and sustainable experiences for our customers — whether they’re behind the wheel, powering their homes or exploring new ways to move. […] The post Inside Toyota R&D: Meet the Engineers Driving Innovation and Mobility appeared first on Toyota USA Newsroom .

entry.title: Toyota Motor Europe announces executive changes for 2026
entry.content: Brussels, Belgium - Toyota Motor Europe (TME) announces today executive level appointments at its European Headquarters and National Sales & Marketing Companies effective 1 st September 2026. Toyota Motor Europe (TME) Mr Ronald Hoedemakers will be appointed Vice President of Quality, replacing Mr Peter Rade who is retiring . National Marketing and Sales Companies (NMSCs) Toyota Austria (TAT) M r. Mesut Aslan will be appointed as Managing Director of Toyota Austria (TAT), taking over from Mr....

entry.title: Toyota Full-Line Pricing
entry.content: ﻿﻿﻿﻿﻿﻿﻿﻿﻿﻿﻿﻿﻿﻿﻿﻿﻿﻿ The post Toyota Full-Line Pricing appeared first on Toyota USA Newsroom .

entry.title: [Toyota Times] Superconductor x Hydrogen Engine: A World-First Challenge at the Fuji 24 Hours
entry.content: Once again in 2026, the hydrogen-powered GR Corolla joined in the Super Taikyu Fuji 24 Hours. This year, it became the first race car in the world to compete with a superconducting liquid hydrogen pump onboard.

entry.title: Toyota Mobility Foundation names Venice winners in Global Sustainable Cities Challenge
entry.content: VENICE (June 17, 2026) – The Toyota Mobility Foundation (TMF) and City of Venice today announced BetterPoints and OpenMove, in partnership with Factual Consulting, as the winners of Toyota Mobility Foundation’s Sustainable Cities Challenge (SCC) in Venice. The announcement marks the conclusion of the Venice section of TMF’s three-year global competition to support sustainable urban mobility solutions. In addition to Venice, Challenges were held simultaneously in Detroit, US and Varanasi, Indi...

entry.title: TMC Announces Changes to Board Members and Executive Structure
entry.content: Toyota Motor Corporation (TMC) today assigned members of the board of directors at its Ordinary General Shareholders' Meeting, and appointed representative directors and directors with special titles at a subsequent Board meeting. On the same day, TMC announced its executive appointments following the Ordinary General Shareholders' Meeting.

entry.title: Superconductor Ã Hydrogen Engine: A World-First Challenge at the Fuji 24 Hours
entry.content: Once again in 2026, the hydrogen-powered GR Corolla joined in the Super Taikyu Fuji 24 Hours. This year, it became the first race car in the world to compete with a superconducting liquid hydrogen pump onboard.

entry.title: Toyota award to support lithium-ion battery fire prevention research
entry.content: Toyota award to support lithium-ion battery fire prevention research

entry.title: Toyota Mississippi Featured on “Built in America” TV Series
entry.content: Toyota’s Corolla plant in Blue Springs, Mississippi is featured in the national Built in America series, highlighting the people, technology, and craftsmanship behind American manufacturing. The documentary style show highlights companies that manufacture in the U.S. and offers an inside […] The post Toyota Mississippi Featured on “Built in America” TV Series appeared first on Toyota USA Newsroom .

entry.title: Toyota Shows How It Is Turning Climate Goals Into Action On “Earth With John Holden” This Weekend
entry.content: PLANO, Texas (June 16, 2026) — Toyota Motor North America will be featured in an upcoming episode of Earth with John Holden, airing Sunday, June 21, on Bloomberg Television. The episode showcases Toyota's ongoing commitment to innovative environmental initiatives designed to help create a more sustainable future. The post Toyota Shows How It Is Turning Climate Goals Into Action On “Earth With John Holden” This Weekend appeared first on Toyota USA Newsroom .

entry.title: Toyota award to support lithium-ion battery fire prevention research
entry.content: Toyota award to support lithium-ion battery fire prevention research

entry.title: GRMN Corolla--A Car Built to Tackle the NÃ¼rburgring
entry.content: Sixty years after the arrival of the first-generation Corolla, Toyota has unveiled a new GRMN edition. We attended the media briefing held during Round 3 of the 2026 Super Taikyu Series, the Fuji 24 Hours.

entry.title: Built to Last: Toyota’s Mobility Journey
entry.content: PLANO, Texas (June 15, 2026) — Seven decades. In the life of a nation, it’s a chapter. In the life of an industry, it’s an evolution. But for one company, it has been a promise kept – a promise not just to sell cars in America, but to assemble them here, alongside the people who drive them. The post Built to Last: Toyota’s Mobility Journey appeared first on Toyota USA Newsroom .

entry.title: Le Mans 24 Hours: Race - Message from Hiroki Nakajima (Executive Vice President) after the Le Mans 24 Hours victory
entry.content: To all the fans who fought with us at the Le Mans 24 Hours. To the ACO, FIA, marshals, and officials who supported the race. And to all our competitors who fought so hard for 24 hours. Thank you very much. First, to the drivers of car number 7 and to everyone in the team. Congratulations on this victory and thank you so much. This year's Le Mans was not an easy race. In qualifying our cars were 14th and 15th. It was not an ideal starting position. From there, our team members pooled their kno...

entry.title: [Toyota Times] Shining Light on the Genba - ABAJ Chairman Toyoda Speaks About His Role
entry.content: What will it take to make cars a more prominent part of Japanese culture? On the day of the Automobile Business & Culture Association of Japan's general meeting, Chairman Toyoda described his role as that of a lighting technician. What did he mean?

entry.title: Le Mans 24 Hours: Race Le Mans victory for TOYOTA RACING
entry.content: TOYOTA RACING overcame challenges during an intense battle through day and night to win an epic 94th Le Mans 24 Hours, the third round of the 2026 FIA World Endurance Championship (WEC).

entry.title: Le Mans victory for TOYOTA RACING
entry.content: A crowd of 350,105 fans watched an epic Hypercar contest in one of the closest and most unpredictable Le Mans 24 Hours for many years, which delivered TOYOTA’s sixth win in the legendary French race. Mike Conway, Kamui Kobayashi and Nyck de Vries completed a nerve-wracking win by just 10.913secs after 381 laps of relentless competition in their #7 TR010 HYBRID. For Mike and Kamui, it represents a second win after their 2021 triumph, while it is Nyck’s first overall win. Sébastien Buemi, Brend...

entry.title: Shining Light on the Genba--ABAJ Chairman Toyoda Speaks About His Role
entry.content: What will it take to make cars a more prominent part of Japanese culture? On the day of the Automobile Business & Culture Association of Japanâs general meeting, Chairman Toyoda described his role as that of a lighting technician. What did he mean?

entry.title: Le Mans 24 Hours: 12H Update
entry.content: After starting from 14th, the #7 car gained positions on the track and via fast laps on a clear track thanks to an early fuel stop. However, it lost time due to a puncture after around three hours, dropping it out of the top 10. Strong pace from all drivers helped it move back into the top eight. An effective strategy and Sébastien’s pace on a clear track helped the #8 into the lead when his rivals pitted later in the opening hour, starting a three-way battle at the front which ran until a sa...

entry.title: Vivid Solar Project Harvests Energy with Flair
entry.content: A cross-functional team from Toyota’s Advanced Product Planning Office (APPO) and Toyota Research Institute of North America (TRINA) have found a way to combine vibrant color schemes with proven solar technology, resulting in innovative and appealing ways to harvest energy. […] The post Vivid Solar Project Harvests Energy with Flair appeared first on Toyota USA Newsroom .

entry.title: A Neighborly Chat: SVP Daisuke Toyoda on the Future of Woven City and What He Hopes to Pass On
entry.content: A Neighborly Chat: SVP Daisuke Toyoda on the Future of Woven City and What He Hopes to Pass On

entry.title: A Neighborly Chat: SVP Daisuke Toyoda on the Future of Woven City and What He Hopes to Pass On
entry.content: A Neighborly Chat: SVP Daisuke Toyoda on the Future of Woven City and What He Hopes to Pass On

entry.title: The all-new Toyota Hilux
entry.content: INTRODUCTION With a global reputation for exceptional toughness established across seven decades and with more than 27 million sales to its credit, it might be thought Hilux has little left to achieve. An icon of Toyota Quality, Durability and Reliability, it has taken all challenges in its stride. There are new horizons to explore, however. The all-new, ninth generation Hilux breaks fresh ground in technology and design while retaining the exceptional performance capabilities that have long...

entry.title: Le Mans 24 Hours: Free Practice and Hyperpole - TOYOTA RACING confirms Le Mans grid positions
entry.content: The #7 TR010 HYBRID of Mike Conway, Kamui Kobayashi and Nyck de Vries will line up 14th on the grid when the race begins at 4pm CEST on Saturday, with Sébastien Buemi, Brendon Hartley and Ryō Hirakawa just behind, in 15th, in the #8 TR010 HYBRID. Kamui Kobayashi and Ryō Hirakawa took the wheel of their respective cars for Hyperpole 1, aiming to be among the fastest 10 to progress. Their first flying laps initially put them in the top 10, and after a stop for new soft Michelin tyres, both look...

entry.title: Three robotics breakthroughs signal shift toward real-world deployment
entry.content: Three robotics breakthroughs signal shift toward real-world deployment

entry.title: Celebrating 25 Years of Sweet Home Toyota Alabama
entry.content: HUNTSVILLE, Ala. (June 11, 2026) – In 2001, Toyota made its home in Alabama, and now, plenty of big wheels are turning thanks to the nearly 1 million engines and 500,000 differentials assembled every year at the Huntsville plant. What started as a $220 million investment has grown into an unshakable $1.7 billion advanced manufacturing facility. The post Celebrating 25 Years of Sweet Home Toyota Alabama appeared first on Toyota USA Newsroom .

entry.title: A Neighborly Chat: SVP Daisuke Toyoda on the Future of Woven City and What He Hopes to Pass On
entry.content: Daisuke Toyoda, Senior Vice President of Woven by Toyota, and Toyota Timesâ Yuta Tomikawa are neighbors in Woven City. Here, these two Weavers sit down to discuss life in the city and the future they envision for it.

entry.title: Toyota Celebra La Pasión Inquebrantable De Los Fans Latinos Con Una Campaña De Fútbol Basada En El Aguante
entry.content: PLANO, Texas (11 de junio de 2026) — Este verano, Toyota destaca la pasión inquebrantable de los fans latinos por el fútbol con el lanzamiento de “El aguante es lo nuestro”, una campaña de enfoque cultural que celebra la fe, […] The post Toyota Celebra La Pasión Inquebrantable De Los Fans Latinos Con Una Campaña De Fútbol Basada En El Aguante appeared first on Toyota USA Newsroom .

entry.title: Toyota Celebrates Latino Fans’ Unwavering Passion with Soccer Campaign Rooted in Endurance
entry.content: PLANO, Texas (June 11, 2026) — This summer, Toyota is spotlighting the unwavering passion of Latino soccer fans with the launch of “Endurance Is Our Game,” a culturally driven campaign that celebrates belief, resilience, and the refusal to give up. Inspired by the insight that Latino fútbol fans stay committed through every high and low, the campaign draws a powerful parallel between that enduring spirit and Toyota trucks which are built to go the distance. The post Toyota Celebrates Latino F...

entry.title: Le Mans 24 Hours – LH2 Demonstration
entry.content: The TR LH2 Racing Prototype is based on the same chassis as the TR010 HYBRID Hypercar which will compete in the Le Mans 24 Hours on 13-14 June. It is intended to advance the development of hydrogen technology in motorsports. This activity supports Toyota’s continuous development of hydrogen technology and infrastructure, as well as helping build relationships to expand the possibilities of hydrogen through the challenge of motorsports. Toyota has taken on the challenge of hydrogen engine deve...

entry.title: Le Mans 24 Hours: Free practice and qualifying
entry.content: The real track action on the Circuit de la Sarthe began with free practice, prior to qualifying. Five hours of free practice took place either side of qualifying, when the 15 Hypercars which will progress to Hyperpole on Thursday – as well as the starting grid positions for those outside the top-15 – is determined.

entry.title: Taking Japanese Music Global: Where the MUSIC WAY PROJECT Stands Now
entry.content: The Japan Culture and Entertainment Industry Promotion Association (CEIPA) announced its partnership with the Toyota Group in 2025. We asked Board Member Yutaka Inaba why CEIPA was formed and what it hopes the Toyota Group will bring.

entry.title: Together We Are Stronger: Toyota’s vision for Europe focuses on inclusion and pragmatism in support of the EU’s ambition to stimulate competitiveness and decarbonise its automotive industry
entry.content: Brussels, 10 th June 2026 – speaking at the Automotive News Europe Congress, Yoshihiro Nakata, President & CEO of Toyota Motor Europe (TME), set out Toyota’s vision for a competitive, resilient and decarbonised European automotive industry, calling for inclusive partnerships, technological diversity and regulatory pragmatism. He highlighted targeted adjustments to the proposed Industrial Accelerator Act and Automotive Package, aimed at strengthening Europe’s global competitiveness whilst deli...

entry.title: [Toyota Times] Rally Japan 2026 | Toyota Sweeps Top 4! First May Rally Deepens Community Ties
entry.content: Rally Japan 2026 was held in May for the first time. Behind Toyota's achievement of sweeping the top four spots was unified local community support.

entry.title: Toyota Invests in Self-Driving Startup Tier IV to Accelerate Autonomous Vehicle Development - Profitability Analysis
entry.content: Toyota Invests in Self-Driving Startup Tier IV to Accelerate Autonomous Vehicle Development - Profitability Analysis

entry.title: Rally Japan 2026 | Toyota Sweeps Top 4! First May Rally Deepens Community Ties
entry.content: Rally Japan 2026 was held in May for the first time. Behind Toyotaâs achievement of sweeping the top four spots was unified local community support.

entry.title: Le Mans 24 Hours: Activities - TOYOTA RACING connecting with fans at the track and beyond
entry.content: Two TR010 HYBRID Hypercars will compete at the Circuit de la Sarthe in front of around 300,000 fans on 13-14 June, seeking the team’s sixth Le Mans victory. Fans anywhere in the world can follow the team’s progress via TOYOTA RACING’s dedicated Le Mans 24 Hours website, www.toyota-racing.com/le-mans-special-2026, which features live onboard cameras from free practice, qualifying and the race, as well as other content. The website also displays a new key visual for Le Mans which highlights its...

entry.title: Toyota to participate in the "1000 Miglia Gran Turismo Experience 2026," a special program of the historic Italian rally, the 1000 Miglia
entry.content: Toyota Motor Corporation (Toyota) will participate in the 1000 Miglia Gran Turismo Experience 2026 (Miglia Gran Turismo), a special program for the 1000 Miglia 2026 to be held in Brescia, Italy, over five days from June 9 to 13, 2026 (Japan time). This marks the first time that a Japanese manufacturer has entered vehicles in a 1000 Miglia-related event.

entry.title: How Physical AI Systems Fuel Nvidia’s Robotics Expansion
entry.content: How Physical AI Systems Fuel Nvidia’s Robotics Expansion

entry.title: Toyota C-HR Ten Years of Standing Out
entry.content: The pioneering Toyota C-HR celebrates 10 years since its debut, which rewrote the rule book and sparked a European love affair with the emotive, exciting and efficient crossover. The Toyota C-HR was a landmark model when launched in 2016, bringing the Toyota brand to a new style-conscious audience thanks to its unconventional design, fun-to-drive character and premium quality. It set a new styling benchmark in the European C-SUV segment with bold, sharp-edged design reminiscent of a sports co...

entry.title: Le Mans 24 Hours: Test Day - TOYOTA RACING making Le Mans progress
entry.content: A productive yet challenging day included set-up and tyre analysis. A morning incident for the #8 TR010 HYBRID of Sébastien Buemi, Brendon Hartley and Ryō Hirakawa necessitated extensive repairs. Nevertheless, they finished the day second fastest, while Mike Conway, Kamui Kobayashi and Nyck de Vries were eighth in their #7 TR010 HYBRID. The high-speed 13.626km Circuit de la Sarthe, which includes sections on public roads, is a unique challenge for engineers and drivers. The team worked intens...

entry.title: Robots are learning your job – in the kitchen
entry.content: Robots are learning your job – in the kitchen

entry.title: Inside Toyota Research & Development: Engineers Innovate Mobility for a Changing World
entry.content: At Toyota’s Research & Development (R&D) locations, engineers are tackling some of the biggest challenges in mobility — from autonomous driving and advanced safety systems to clean energy and breakthrough technologies. Their work is shaping not just the cars of […] The post Inside Toyota Research & Development: Engineers Innovate Mobility for a Changing World appeared first on Toyota USA Newsroom .

entry.title: Le Mans 24 Hours: Preview TOYOTA RACING aiming for Le Mans victory
entry.content: TOYOTA RACING will challenge for its sixth victory - and fulfilment of its new For the Engineering Race slogan - in the Le Mans 24 Hours on 13-14 June with the TR010 HYBRID Hypercar.

entry.title: Le Mans 24 Hours: Preview - TOYOTA RACING aiming for Le Mans victory
entry.content: Over 300,000 fans are expected at the Circuit de la Sarthe to watch a 62-car grid – including 18 Hypercars from eight different manufacturers – compete for honours in the 94th edition of the legendary race, round three of the 2026 FIA World Endurance Championship (WEC). As five-time winners and holders of the fastest-ever lap of the French circuit, TOYOTA RACING has high targets for the 2026 edition, Toyota’s 28th entry at Le Mans. Those hopes will be carried by two TR010 HYBRID race cars: th...

entry.title: Hydrogen-Powered GR Corolla Takes on World-First Challenge at Super Taikyu Fuji 24 Hours Race
entry.content: Toyota Motor Corporation (Toyota) will compete in the ENEOS Super Taikyu Series 2026 Empowered by BRIDGESTONE Round 3 NAPAC Fuji 24 Hours Race, taking place on June 5 and 6, with the #32 TGRR GR Corolla H2 concept (the liquid hydrogen-powered GR Corolla), which runs on liquid hydrogen and will become the world's first race car equipped with a superconducting liquid hydrogen pump to compete in a race.

entry.title: Nine Reasons Toyota VehicleMaintenance Matters
entry.content:
Keeping a vehicle well maintained is paramount for its long-term health and performance. Some drivers don’t realize just how much scheduled maintenance can affect a vehicle’s longevity and performance — and that includes electrified vehicles (EVs), too, which also need […] The post Nine Reasons Toyota Vehicle
Maintenance Matters appeared first on Toyota USA Newsroom .

entry.title: Toyota honours Europe’s top retailers with 2026 Ichiban Awards in the Algarve
entry.content: Algarve, Portugal, 4 June 2026 – Toyota Motor Europe has celebrated 47 of its highest-performing retailers with the 2026 Ichiban Award, recognising excellence in customer experience across its European network of more than 2,200 retail operations. Representing 34 countries, this year’s winners exemplify Toyota’s commitment to putting customers first, every day. In addition, seven retailers were honoured with the Going Beyond Award, recognising exceptional achievements across strategic, custom...

entry.title: Toyota is developing fighter jet-inspired safety features for cars and wants to share it
entry.content: Toyota is developing fighter jet-inspired safety features for cars and wants to share it

entry.title: Toyota Kentucky Paint Shop Receives U.S. Department of Energy 2026 Better Project Award
entry.content: GEORGETOWN, Ky. (June 3, 2026) – A breath of fresh air to paint operations earned the Toyota Kentucky engineering team a 2026 Better Project Award from the U.S. Department of Energy Better Buildings & Plants Initiative. With innovative thinking and […] The post Toyota Kentucky Paint Shop Receives U.S. Department of Energy 2026 Better Project Award appeared first on Toyota USA Newsroom .

entry.title: [Toyota Times] How Does the All-New TZ Drive? A Look Inside the Development Hub and a Growing Charging Network
entry.content: Here, we take a closer look at Toyota Technical Center Shimoyama, the development site for the TZ, the all-new BEV from Lexus, as well as the charging network growing across Japanâall part of the effort to bring Lexus's vision to life.

entry.title: Le Mans 24 Hours: TR LH2 Racing Prototype Le Mans demonstration for liquid hydrogen-fuelled TR LH2 Racing Prototype
entry.content: TOYOTA RACING will conduct the first public demonstration drives of its liquid hydrogen-fuelled TR LH2 Racing Prototype next week at the Circuit de la Sarthe, venue for the 94th edition of the Le Mans 24 Hours.

entry.title: Le Mans 24 Hours: TR LH2 Racing Prototype
entry.content: TOYOTA RACING will conduct the first public demonstration drives of its liquid hydrogen-fuelled TR LH2 Racing Prototype next week at the Circuit de la Sarthe, venue for the 94th edition of the Le Mans 24 Hours. The TR LH2 Racing Prototype is based on the same chassis as the TR010 HYBRID Hypercar which will compete in the Le Mans 24 Hours on 13-14 June. It is intended to advance the development of hydrogen technology in motorsports. On Thursday 11 June (12.50pm) and Saturday 13 June (12.45pm),...

entry.content: How Is AI Regulated? Examples, Benefits, & Drawbacks | Britannica Money

entry.title: THE MOVEUM YOKOHAMA to Launch New Film Program This Fall
entry.content: Thank you very much for your continued patronage of THE MOVEUM YOKOHAMA. The facility has been temporarily closed as part of our efforts to ensure a safe and comfortable environment for all visitors. During this time, we have also decided to move forward with preparations for a renewal aimed at further enhancing the venue's appeal.

entry.content: Inaugural Frontiers of AI Summit Focuses on the Foundational Research Behind AI’s Rapid Progress

entry.title: Toyota’s Collaborative Safety Research Center Touts Partnerships, Eyes Future with Announcement of 10 New Projects
entry.content: ANN ARBOR, Mich. (June 2, 2026) – Before joining Toyota’s Collaborative Safety Research Center (CSRC), Zhaonan Sun spent years studying how the human body absorbs the force of a crash. The post Toyota’s Collaborative Safety Research Center Touts Partnerships, Eyes Future with Announcement of 10 New Projects appeared first on Toyota USA Newsroom .

entry.title: Northwestern Applied Mathematics Alumni Reach New Career Milestones
entry.content: Northwestern Applied Mathematics Alumni Reach New Career Milestones

entry.title: GR Premiers GRMN Corolla
entry.content: GAZOO Racing (GR) held the world premiere today of the GRMN Corollaâthe ultimate GR Corolla, engineered to deliver a confident, full-throttle experience on Germany's Nurburgring racetrack, the starting point for both GR, which is committed to building ever-better motorsports-bred cars, and Toyota Master Driver Morizo. The GRMN Corolla represents a comprehensive honing of the GR Corolla ignited by Morizo's strong desire to "bring back a Corolla that captivates our customers".

entry.title: Peak Performance: Toyota Introduces the 2026 GRMN Corolla
entry.content: PLANO, Texas (June 1, 2026) – Driving enthusiasts, rejoice: GAZOO Racing (GR) has unveiled the 2026 GRMN Corolla, the ultimate in GR Corolla performance. This track-oriented compact hatchback was developed under GR’s philosophy of “making better cars starting from motorsport,” and it was engineered so drivers can confidently push it to the limit at the Nürburgring, where Master Driver Akio Toyoda, also known as Morizo, began his driving career. The post Peak Performance: Toyota Introduces the...

entry.title: Toyota Turns Up the Thrill for 2027 with New Updates to GR86
entry.content: PLEASANTON, Calif. (June 1, 2026) – Making its debut at FuelFest in the Bay Area, where car culture, performance, passion and the enthusiast community come together, the 2027 Toyota GR86 returns with a series of focused enhancements designed to deepen the connection between driver, car and road. Built for enthusiasts and engineered with input shaped by motorsports, the GR86 continues to deliver the kind of lightweight, rear-wheel-drive fun that has made it a favorite among sports car purists...

entry.title: The Next Era In Multimedia: Lexus Interface Sets A New Standard
entry.content: Toyota Connected engineers and designers played a key role in the development of new features, functionality and enhancements in the latest version of the Lexus Interface multimedia system.

entry.title: Rally Japan: Day 3 Evans leads TGR-WRT 1-2-3-4 on home roads
entry.content: Elfyn Evans has won Rally Japan for the third time in four years, leading a 1-2-3-4 finish for the TOYOTA GAZOO Racing World Rally Team on home roads. Sebastien Ogier and Sami Pajari joined Evans on the podium with local hero Takamoto Katsuta completing the top four.

entry.title: Toyota Announces New Exhibition at the Toyota Kaikan Museum
entry.content: Toyota Motor Corporation (TMC) has added a new exhibition space to the Toyota Kaikan Museum, a corporate exhibition hall located in Toyota City. Titled "TOYOTA's Creative Carmaking," the new section will open to the public on Friday, June 5. The immersive exhibits feature real vehicles and visual displays that guide visitors through each stage of Toyota's long-established carmaking process, from vehicle planning and development to procurement, production, and customer delivery.

entry.title: Rally Japan: Day 3 - Evans leads TGR-WRT 1-2-3-4 on home roads
entry.content: It is the fourth consecutive win for the GR YARIS Rally1 car from five editions of the rally held in Toyota City, in what is due to be the final time the current specification of Rally1 cars compete on Japanese roads before new regulations are introduced in 2027. This year, with a move forward from November to late May, the event was held in warmer temperatures which exceeded 30 degrees centigrade and provided a different challenge for the crews, their cars and their tyres. On the narrow and...

entry.title: Rally Japan: Day 2 - TGR-WRT’s rally leader Evans handles the heat
entry.content: Saturday was the longest day of the rally, featuring eight stages and 120.22 competitive kilometres. The route took crews north-east from Toyota City for a trio of tests to be repeated the other side of a mid-day tyre-fitting zone, before two passes of a new super special stage. Temperatures in excess of 30 degrees centigrade tested tyres, cars and crews alike. Evans started the day with a lead of 15.7 seconds over team-mate Oliver Solberg. While Evans won the second stage of the morning loop...

entry.title: One-two victory for TOYOTA GAZOO Racing W2RC in Argentina
entry.content: TOYOTA GAZOO Racing W2RC (TGR W2RC) earned a one-two victory in the Desafío Ruta 40, round three of the 2026 FIA World Rally-Raid Championship (W2RC), after an exciting final day in Argentina. The team’s DKR GR Hilux pickups conquered challenging terrain over five days in the spectacular Andes mountains to win for the first time this season and strengthen its World Championship challenge. TGR W2RC headed into the final day leading the rally but facing a demanding Stage 5, which took place on...

entry.title: Fellow Reflections: Steven Torrisi
entry.content: Fellow Reflections: Steven Torrisi

entry.title: Brian Plancher Wins Toyota Research Institute Grant
entry.content: Brian Plancher Wins Toyota Research Institute Grant

entry.title: Toyota Turns Forza Horizon 6 into a Real-World Immersive “Barn Find” Experience at Westfield Century City
entry.content: PLANO, Texas (May 29, 2026) – Toyota today announced “Lost & Found: The Challenge” Forza Horizon and Toyota’s Barn Find Pop-Up at Westfield Century City. The free public activation takes place Saturday, May 30, 2026, from 10 a.m. – 8 […] The post Toyota Turns Forza Horizon 6 into a Real-World Immersive “Barn Find” Experience at Westfield Century City appeared first on Toyota USA Newsroom .

entry.title: Sung Kang’s Toyota Story Comes Full Circleat Bay Area FuelFest
entry.content:
Actor and car enthusiast Sung Kang reflects on his lifelong connection to Toyota and the community that shaped his passion for drifting. Fans at Bay Area FuelFest get an up-close look at “Lola,” the iconic Toyota AE86 featured in Kang’s […] The post Sung Kang’s Toyota Story Comes Full Circle
at Bay Area FuelFest appeared first on Toyota USA Newsroom .

entry.title: Rally Japan: Day 1 - Evans claims the lead for TGR-WRT on Japanese roads
entry.content: After a ceremonial start launched the rally at Nagoya Castle on Thursday evening, the competitive action began with two loops of stages in the forest-covered mountains to the east of Toyota City. The loop began with the all-new Asuke stage, where Oliver Solberg was fastest to claim the early lead ahead of team-mates Sami Pajari and Sébastien Ogier. Evans was fourth-fastest there but then went quickest in the infamous Isegami’s Tunnel test by 7.5 seconds to leap into the lead. He was also fast...

entry.title: [Toyota Times] Driving Kakezan with New Partners at Woven City
entry.content: At Woven City's newly completed development hub, the Inventor Garage, AI technologies currently undergoing development were unveiled, along with new partners who will help drive Kakezan.

entry.title: TOYOTA GAZOO Racing W2RC fights adversity to retain lead in Argentina
entry.content: TOYOTA GAZOO Racing W2RC (TGR W2RC) overcame a demanding and dramatic day to retain the lead of the Desafío Ruta 40, the third round of the 2026 FIA World Rally-Raid Championship (W2RC). Stage 4 was another long and rugged test for drivers and navigators through the spectacular landscape of the Andes mountains. It began with a steep, winding climb to a 3,110 m mountain top and featured ravines, rocks and narrow, rough trails over 306 km of timed action on the route back to San Juan. The team’...

entry.title: Driving Kakezan with New Partners at Woven City
entry.content: At Woven Cityâs newly completed development hub, the Inventor Garage, AI technologies currently undergoing development were unveiled, along with new partners who will help drive Kakezan.

entry.title: Sales, Production, and Export Results for April 2026
entry.content: Toyota Motor Corporation announces its sales, production, and export results for Aplil 2026, including those for subsidiaries Daihatsu Motor Co., Ltd.

entry.title: Stage 3 win and overall lead for TOYOTA GAZOO Racing W2RC
entry.content: TOYOTA GAZOO Racing W2RC (TGR W2RC) seized control of the Desafío Ruta 40 in Argentina with a commanding performance on the longest special stage of the rally. Large crowds gathered to watch the W2RC field take on the most demanding day of the rally so far. TGR W2RC and its DKR GR Hilux pickups rose to the challenge and emerged from more than four gruelling hours of flat-out competition in first and second place overall. The difficult Stage 3 route took competitors into the Andes mountains an...

entry.title: Toyota Launches New Hilux in Japan
entry.content: Toyota Launches New Hilux in Japan

entry.title: Toyota Financial Services Announces Executive Changes
entry.content: PLANO, Texas (May 27, 2026) – Toyota Financial Services (TFS) is pleased to announce the following executive changes: The post Toyota Financial Services Announces Executive Changes appeared first on Toyota USA Newsroom .

entry.title: Toyota Recalls Certain Model Year2024-2025 Toyota Land Cruiser, Mirai, Lexus UX and GX vehicles
entry.content:
PLANO, Texas (May 27, 2026) — Toyota is conducting a safety recall involving certain model year 2024-2025 Land Cruiser, Mirai, Lexus UX, and GX vehicles in North America. Approximately 82,000 vehicles are involved in this recall in the U.S. Some areas […] The post Toyota Recalls Certain Model Year
2024-2025 Toyota Land Cruiser, Mirai,
Lexus UX and GX vehicles appeared first on Toyota USA Newsroom .

entry.title: [Toyota Times] Inheriting the Beliefs and Sincerity of the Man Who Built Toyota's Sales Network
entry.content: The second installment of Toyota Times News' Toyota Legends series spotlights Shotaro Kamiya, the man who built Toyota's sales network. It explores the achievements and character of the man known as the God of Car Sales.

entry.title: TMC Announces Changes to Organizational Structure and Executives and Senior Professional/Senior Management Employee Positions
entry.content: On July 1, Toyota Motor Corporation intends to make the following organizational and Executives and senior professional/senior management changes.

entry.title: TOYOTA GAZOO Racing W2RC strengthens its challenge in Argentina
entry.content: TOYOTA GAZOO Racing W2RC (TGR W2RC) moved into contention for victory in Argentina during an intense Stage 2 of the Desafío Ruta 40, round three of the 2026 FIA World Rally-Raid Championship (W2RC). After two DKR GR Hilux finished in the top six on the opening stage, the crews stepped up a gear on Tuesday as TGR W2RC strengthened its overall position. Stage 2 consisted of a relatively short 128 km timed section, featuring steep climbs and descents on mostly sandy tracks, with dense vegetation...

entry.title: New Toyota Study Says Canadian Drivers Make Smart Use of PHEVs
entry.content: New Toyota Study Says Canadian Drivers Make Smart Use of PHEVs

entry.title: Inheriting the Beliefs and Sincerity of the Man Who Built Toyota's Sales Network
entry.content: The second installment of Toyota Times Newsâ Toyota Legends series spotlights Shotaro Kamiya, the man who built Toyotaâs sales network. It explores the achievements and character of the man known as the God of Car Sales.

entry.title: A guide to everything happening at the 2026 Robotics Summit & Expo
entry.content: A guide to everything happening at the 2026 Robotics Summit & Expo

entry.title: Positive start for TOYOTA GAZOO Racing W2RC in Argentina
entry.content: TOYOTA GAZOO Racing W2RC (TGR W2RC) is battling at the front of the third round of the 2026 FIA World Rally-Raid Championship (W2RC) with two DKR GR Hilux in the top six after a hard-fought opening day on the Desafío Ruta 40 in Argentina. Stage 1 took place north of San Juan on Monday. It included 340 km of timed action on dried riverbeds, salt flats and gravel plains through the spectacular Andes mountains. As well as the rugged off-road conditions, crews also had to contend with altitudes o...

entry.title: 24 Hours of Nürburgring 2026 - 77 Laps in the GR YARIS: 24 Hours of Perseverance Through Setbacks
entry.content: Despite having completed the 2025 race without any need for repairs, the GR YARIS DAT crew recognized that there was still room for further improvement and set out to explore new territory. Reflecting these efforts, Car No. 109, under the leadership of Chief Engineer Hisatomi, received aggressive updates focused on the powertrain, aerodynamics, and a wider track. At the second round of the NLS in March, the car achieved a lap time approximately 10 seconds faster than last year’s specification...

entry.title: No More Wondering, "Is This the Right Color?"--A New Tool Makes Wire Colors Visible
entry.content: Toyotaâs Creative Idea Suggestion System makes work more fun and interesting. This time, we look at a team improvement effort aimed at creating a workplace where everyone can play an active role.

entry.title: Protecting Communities Through Air Mobility at the Ever-Better Carmaking Genba
entry.content: Toyota Technical Center Shimoyama (TTC-S), the venue for the world premiere of the new Lexus TZ, also serves another role: a disaster response hub protecting the people of Toyota City in times of emergency.

entry.title: Critics Claimed PHEVs Don’t Make Sense. Toyota Just Proved Them Wrong
entry.content: Critics Claimed PHEVs Don’t Make Sense. Toyota Just Proved Them Wrong
